summary: A stellar audience recording that perfectly captures a flawless show featuring standout versions of Dire Wolf, Ripple, Lazy Lightnin' > Supplication and more.
review: The audience tape is praised as an amazingly accurate, “heavenly” mix that conveys the full ambience of the Warfield’s massive sound system.  The performance itself hit every mark – every song was described as a masterpiece with particular love for Dire Wolf, Ripple, Lazy Lightnin' > Supplication, Sailor > Saint and Terrapin Station.  Overall both the music and the recording are highly recommended.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviewers highlight an exceptional performance and a superb audience mix; despite only two reviews, the detailed positive feedback gives confidence in a high rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as an amazingly accurate representation with a stellar, consistent house mix throughout the venue; no notable flaws reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set hit every requested song and flowed seamlessly, with the reviewer noting that “every song throughout is a masterpiece” and the band delivering a charged‑up performance.
